p.span: This industry is made for architects that sell all kind of architectural services such as feasibility studies, schematic design, design development, worksite follow-up, energy efficiency assessment.

ul.li: Project App: Orchestrate complex architectural projects by managing distinct phases like schematic design, development, and construction.
Timesheets App: Ensure profitability by accurately tracking time spent on design drafting, client meetings, and site visits.
CRM App: Centralize client interactions to effectively manage leads and convert design proposals into signed contracts.
Documents App: Securely organize, version, and share critical files such as architectural drawings, permits, and blueprints.
Sales App: Create professional proposals and contracts tailored for architectural services, streamlining the agreement process.
Invoicing App: Maintain healthy cash flow by billing clients flexibly based on project milestones or actual time spent.
Knowledge App: Centralize design standards, building codes, and internal guidelines to ensure consistency across the team.

p.span: The CRM App is designed to let architecture firms easily manage new prospects, called "Opportunities" in Odoo. Track expected revenue, manage communications, and never forget to reach out to interested parties. Opportunities get created in the CRM by filling the "Contact us" form on the website, or manually by a salesperson.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3

p.span: Create automated actions to never forget to execute your next steps to keep your business growing, for example:

ul.li: A phone call activity is created when there's a new opportunity
A to-do activity is created when the opportunity moves to the "needs analysis" stage"

li.span: A reminder to cancel the opportunity is created when the quotation is sent

span.span: Learn more on how to automate your business using Odoo Studio

p.span: When it's time to provide the customer with an estimate, a quote can be created by clicking the "New Quotation" button on the opportunity. These can also be pre-filled using the Quotation Template feature. Quotation Templates allow you to quickly choose a preset that contains sections and their products - especially useful when you're working with similar, elaborate templates.

span.span: A set of architectural services have already been created and can be edited to match the architects' services.

p.span: Once a quotation has been confirmed, a project is automatically generated in the Project app, with associated tasks.

span.span: It's the heart of your architectural work. It's where you'll track the advancement of the various tasks, generate new invoices (if needed), and assign tasks to employees and contractors alike. Track your timesheets, margins, purchase orders, and more using the project menu to quickly access relevant information.
Use the Project Menu to quickly access

Use the documents app to store and share all project documents. Sub-workspaces get created for each project, and link to these sub-workspace can be shared with customers so that they have a direct access to all produced documents.
